cannot_assert: This descriptive plot alone does not establish cross-donor reproducibility, causality, or independent biomarker performance.
confirmed: Point area maps percent expressed on a 0-100 scale and fill maps scaled average expression for 27 exported marker summaries.
interpretable: Marker labels, nine cell groups, area legend, and fill legend are readable.
recommendation: Keep with the explicit area and fill legend titles.
visible: No marker labels or legends are clipped; small platelet group remains visibly represented.
